summary: Photonic Inc., in partnership with TELUS, has successfully demonstrated the world’s first quantum teleportation over 30 kilometers of commercial fiber optic infrastructure using the TELUS PureFibre network. By leveraging Photonic's Entanglement First architecture—combining silicon-based qubits with photonic connectivity—quantum information was transferred into a matter-based quantum processor capable of storing and using the data, a key milestone distinct from prior experiments that did not achieve remote processing. This accomplishment, announced February 13, 2026, marks a critical step for long-distance quantum networks and future commercial quantum computers. The expanded collaboration agreement between Photonic and TELUS aims to accelerate the deployment of scalable, quantum-secure networking solutions for Canada and beyond.
